ActionCategories.Title: Software Center (SCCM)
ActionCategories.Description: Troubleshoot SCCM client issues, clear cache, restart services, and trigger client actions.

Actions.Name: Clear SCCM Cache
Actions.Description: Removes cached packages from the SCCM client cache folder
Actions.Script: if (!(Get-Service CcmExec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Output 'SCCM client not installed on this device'; exit 0 }; try { $cache = Get-WmiObject -Namespace 'root\ccm\SoftMgmtAgent' -Class CacheInfoEx -ErrorAction Stop; if ($cache) { $cache | ForEach-Object { $_.Delete() }; Write-Output 'SCCM cache cleared successfully' } else { Write-Output 'SCCM cache is already empty' } } catch { Write-Output ('Cache clear failed: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }

Actions.Name: Restart SCCM Service
Actions.Description: Restarts the SMS Agent Host (CcmExec) service
Actions.Script: $svc = Get-Service CcmExec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (!$svc) { Write-Output 'SCCM client (CcmExec) not installed on this device'; exit 0 }; try { Restart-Service CcmExec -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $s = Get-Service CcmExec; Write-Output ('CcmExec service: ' + $s.Status) } catch { Write-Output ('Restart failed: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }

Actions.Name: Trigger Client Actions
Actions.Description: Triggers Machine Policy, Software Update, and Hardware Inventory cycles
Actions.Script: if (!(Get-Service CcmExec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Output 'SCCM client not installed on this device'; exit 0 }; $cycles = @(@{Name='Machine Policy';Id='{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000021}'},@{Name='Software Updates';Id='{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000113}'},@{Name='Hardware Inventory';Id='{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001}'}); $results = @(); foreach ($c in $cycles) { try { Invoke-WmiMethod -Namespace 'root\ccm' -Class 'sms_client' -Name 'TriggerSchedule' -ArgumentList $c.Id -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; $results += ('Triggered: ' + $c.Name) } catch { $results += ('Failed ' + $c.Name + ': ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine)

ActionCategories.Title: Memory & Cleanup
ActionCategories.Description: Free up disk space and RAM by clearing temp files, caches, and unnecessary processes.

Actions.Name: Clear Temp Files
Actions.Description: Removes temporary files from user and system temp folders
Actions.Script: $before = (Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum / 1MB; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $after = (Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum / 1MB; $freed = [math]::Round($before - $after, 2); Write-Output "Temp files cleaned. Freed ~${freed} MB"

Actions.Name: Free Up RAM
Actions.Description: Clears standby memory and working sets to free up physical RAM

Actions.Name: Check Disk Usage
Actions.Description: Shows disk space usage for all local drives
Actions.Script: Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Used -ne $null } | ForEach-Object { $total = [math]::Round(($_.Used + $_.Free) / 1GB, 1); $used = [math]::Round($_.Used / 1GB, 1); $free = [math]::Round($_.Free / 1GB, 1); $pct = [math]::Round(($_.Used / ($_.Used + $_.Free)) * 100, 0); Write-Output ("Drive $($_.Name): " + $used + 'GB / ' + $total + 'GB used (' + $pct + '%) - ' + $free + 'GB free') }

ActionCategories.Title: Connectivity
ActionCategories.Description: Diagnose and fix network issues including DNS, adapters, and IP configuration.

Actions.Name: Flush DNS Cache
Actions.Description: Clears the local DNS resolver cache
Actions.Script: try { Clear-DnsClientCache -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output 'DNS cache flushed successfully' } catch { ipconfig /flushdns; Write-Output 'DNS cache flushed (ipconfig)' }

Actions.Name: Reset Network Adapter
Actions.Description: Disables and re-enables active network adapters to reset connections
Actions.Script: $adapters = Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Up' }; $results = @(); foreach ($a in $adapters) { try { Restart-NetAdapter -Name $a.Name -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop; $results += ('Reset: ' + $a.Name) } catch { $results += ('Failed ' + $a.Name + ': ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; if ($results.Count -eq 0) { Write-Output 'No active adapters found' } else { Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine) }

Actions.Name: Renew IP Address
Actions.Description: Releases and renews DHCP IP address for all adapters
Actions.Script: try { ipconfig /release | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; ipconfig /renew | Out-Null; $ip = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback' -and $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object -First 1).IPAddress; Write-Output ('IP renewed successfully. Current IP: ' + $ip) } catch { Write-Output ('Failed: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }

Actions.Name: Connectivity Test
Actions.Description: Tests connectivity to key endpoints (DNS, gateway, internet)
Actions.Script: $gw = (Get-NetRoute -DestinationPrefix '0.0.0.0/0' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).NextHop; $tests = @(@{Name='Gateway';Target=$gw},@{Name='DNS (8.8.8.8)';Target='8.8.8.8'},@{Name='Internet';Target='google.com'}); $results = @(); foreach ($t in $tests) { if ($t.Target) { $ping = Test-Connection $t.Target -Count 1 -Quiet; if ($ping) { $status = 'OK' } else { $status = 'FAILED' }; $results += ($t.Name + ': ' + $status) } }; Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine)

ActionCategories.Title: Service Management
ActionCategories.Description: Monitor and manage Windows services including health checks and restart operations.

Actions.Name: Full Health Check
Actions.Description: Checks key services, disk, memory, and network status
Actions.Script: $device = $env:COMPUTERNAME; $svc = Get-Service -Name 'CcmExec' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $ss = if ($svc) { $svc.Status.ToString() } else { 'Not Found' }; $disk = Get-PSDrive C; $ds = if ($disk.Free -lt 5GB) { 'Low' } else { 'OK' }; $ns = if (Test-Connection google.com -Count 1 -Quiet) { 'Connected' } else { 'Disconnected' }; $mem = [math]::Round((Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).FreePhysicalMemory / 1024, 0); Write-Output "Device: $device`nService (CcmExec): $ss`nDisk C: $ds ($([math]::Round($disk.Free/1GB,1)) GB free)`nNetwork: $ns`nFree RAM: ${mem} MB"; $body = @{ DeviceName=$device; ServiceStatus=$ss; DiskStatus=$ds; NetworkStatus=$ns; LastUpdated=(Get-Date).ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss') } | ConvertTo-Json; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:5252/api/health' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' | Out-Null } catch {}

Actions.Name: Check Key Services
Actions.Description: Shows status of critical Windows services
Actions.Script: $services = @('CcmExec','wuauserv','BITS','WinRM','Spooler','W32Time'); $results = @(); foreach ($s in $services) { $svc = Get-Service -Name $s -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($svc) { $results += ($svc.DisplayName + ': ' + $svc.Status) } else { $results += ($s + ': Not Found') } }; Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine)

Actions.Name: Restart Windows Update
Actions.Description: Restarts Windows Update and BITS services
Actions.Script: $services = @('wuauserv','BITS'); $results = @(); foreach ($s in $services) { try { Restart-Service $s -Force -ErrorAction Stop; $results += ('Restarted: ' + $s) } catch { $results += ('Failed ' + $s + ': ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output ($results -join [Environment]::NewLine)
